description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: In the store setup help category, find the most popular article about shipping policy templates and copy its shareable URL.

target_names: Shipping Policy Template for Your Store

tasks.name: In the store setup help category, find the most popular article about shipping policy templates and copy its shareable URL.
tasks.description: In the store setup help category, find the most popular article about shipping policy templates and copy its shareable URL.

tasks.instruction: Using the shipping and fulfillment help docs, open the carrier comparison tool, then for United States shipments up to 2 kg costing under $10, select the fastest option and view its setup instructions.

target_names: Carrier Comparison: Choose the Best Shipping Option
Express (0–2 kg) – United States option row

tasks.name: Using the shipping and fulfillment help docs, open the carrier comparison tool, then for United States shipments up to 2 kg costing under $10, select the fastest option and view its setup instructions.
tasks.description: Using the shipping and fulfillment help docs, open the carrier comparison tool, then for United States shipments up to 2 kg costing under $10, select the fastest option and view its setup instructions.

tasks.instruction: From the store integrations help section, open any Shopify-related article that includes an embedded video of 10 minutes or less and start playing that video.
tasks.name: From the store integrations help section, open any Shopify-related article that includes an embedded video of 10 minutes or less and start playing that video.
tasks.description: From the store integrations help section, open any Shopify-related article that includes an embedded video of 10 minutes or less and start playing that video.

tasks.instruction: In the billing and subscriptions help docs, open the guide on changing subscription plans, follow its link to the billing support form, and prepare a downgrade request from a Pro plan to a Basic plan with a maximum budget of $30 per month.

target_names: Billing - downgrade from Pro to Basic

tasks.name: In the billing and subscriptions help docs, open the guide on changing subscription plans, follow its link to the billing support form, and prepare a downgrade request from a Pro plan to a Basic plan with a maximum budget of $30 per month.
tasks.description: In the billing and subscriptions help docs, open the guide on changing subscription plans, follow its link to the billing support form, and prepare a downgrade request from a Pro plan to a Basic plan with a maximum budget of $30 per month.

tasks.instruction: From the shipping and fulfillment help docs, open the article about automatically cancelling unfulfilled orders, use its link to open order automation settings, and enable auto-cancellation after 7 days.

target_names: Auto-cancel Unfulfilled Orders After a Time Limit
Demo store automation with auto-cancel on after 7 days

tasks.name: From the shipping and fulfillment help docs, open the article about automatically cancelling unfulfilled orders, use its link to open order automation settings, and enable auto-cancellation after 7 days.
tasks.description: From the shipping and fulfillment help docs, open the article about automatically cancelling unfulfilled orders, use its link to open order automation settings, and enable auto-cancellation after 7 days.

tasks.instruction: Using the support and messaging help section, open the article with return and refund message templates, use the template intended for defective-item returns to create a new canned response named “Defective item return - template A” in a “Returns & refunds” folder, replace any discount placeholder with “10% discount”, and save it.
tasks.name: Using the support and messaging help section, open the article with return and refund message templates, use the template intended for defective-item returns to create a new canned response named “Defective item return - template A” in a “Returns & refunds” folder, replace any discount placeholder with “10% discount”, and save it.
tasks.description: Using the support and messaging help section, open the article with return and refund message templates, use the template intended for defective-item returns to create a new canned response named “Defective item return - template A” in a “Returns & refunds” folder, replace any discount placeholder with “10% discount”, and save it.

tasks.instruction: From the help center article about the SYNC_409 product feed error, navigate to the system status page, filter for product sync issues, open the incident report form, and submit an issue describing SYNC_409 product feed update problems with medium severity.

target_names: System Status Overview and Incident Reporting

expected_values.subject: SYNC_409 product feed not updating
expected_values.description_includes: SYNC_409 error for product feed updates

tasks.name: From the help center article about the SYNC_409 product feed error, navigate to the system status page, filter for product sync issues, open the incident report form, and submit an issue describing SYNC_409 product feed update problems with medium severity.
tasks.description: From the help center article about the SYNC_409 product feed error, navigate to the system status page, filter for product sync issues, open the incident report form, and submit an issue describing SYNC_409 product feed update problems with medium severity.

tasks.instruction: In the payments and payouts help docs, use the documentation on payout schedules and minimum thresholds to open payout settings, then set payouts to occur weekly with a minimum payout amount of $100 in USD.

target_names: Demo store weekly payouts with 100 USD threshold

tasks.name: In the payments and payouts help docs, use the documentation on payout schedules and minimum thresholds to open payout settings, then set payouts to occur weekly with a minimum payout amount of $100 in USD.
tasks.description: In the payments and payouts help docs, use the documentation on payout schedules and minimum thresholds to open payout settings, then set payouts to occur weekly with a minimum payout amount of $100 in USD.
